metadata.changes:
Change 1: Replace:
  if p == "selectedbynasa":
              return f"{subj} was selected by NASA in {obj}"
          if p == "mission":
with:
  if p == "selectedbynasa":
              return f"{subj} was selected by NASA in {obj}"
          if p == "dateofretirement":
              # Handle various date formats (ISO or month year)
              try:
                  # Try ISO first
                  from datetime import datetime
                  dt = datetime.strptime(obj, "%Y-%m-%d")
                  return f"{subj} retired on {dt.strftime('%B %-d, %Y')}"
              except Exception:
                  # Try month year (e.g., June 1981)
                  return f"{subj} retired in {obj}"
          if p == "mission":
Change 2: Replace:
  if p == "partsType".lower():
              # e.g., "Dallas | partsType | List of counties in Texas"
              return f"{subj} is part of a {obj.lower()}"
with:
  if p == "partstype":
              # e.g., "Dallas | partsType | List of counties in Texas"
              # Try to extract the entity type and location from the object description
              # Expected pattern: "List of <type> in <location>"
              import re
              m = re.search(r"List of (\w+?)s? in (.+)", obj, re.IGNORECASE)
              if m:
                  typ = m.group(1).lower()
                  loc = m.group(2)
                  # Use appropriate article
                  article = "an" if typ[0] in "aeiou" else "a"
                  return f"{subj} is {article} {typ} in {loc}"
              # Fallback
              return f"{subj} is part of a {obj.lower()}"
